name: Ingredients & Allergens — Raw Soaps and Suds

mainEntity.name: Is there still lye in the finished soap?

acceptedAnswer.text: No active lye remains. The lye reacts completely with the coconut oil and shea butter during saponification, and after the bars cure there's no active lye left in the finished soap.

mainEntity.name: What is the soap made of?

acceptedAnswer.text: Coconut oil and shea butter, saponified with lye (sodium hydroxide), and scented with essential oils. Every bar shares that same base.

mainEntity.name: How much does a bar cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: $4 per bar, or 3 for $10 — mix and match any of the five scents.
Email or call Jelisha with the scents and quantity you want. She confirms availability and your total, then you arrange a pickup time and place. See the Contact page for the steps.
No — local pickup only in Johnson County, Texas. There's no shipping and no online checkout.
